query_normalized: predicting chemical reaction yields from spectroscopic data with attention mechanisms chemistry
rationale: The paper focuses on the risks of changing data sources in the context of official statistics and policy-making, which is an entirely different domain from predicting chemical reaction yields using spectroscopic data. It does not address the specific biological/chemical mechanism, the spectroscopic variables, the attention mechanism methodology, or the empirical population required by the user's question, failing all inclusion criteria (a-f) and triggering the "Off-domain entirely" rejection rul
